tool.name: get_scan_status
tool.description:
Get a compressed real-time dashboard of the current scan: hypothesis states, coverage gaps, confirmed findings, cost, iteration count, and recommended next action.
WHEN TO CALL: - At the start of EVERY major decision (what to test next) - Before reporting findings (check for pending confirmed hypotheses) - When context feels stale or you've run 10+ iterations without a clear plan - After returning from a long wait_for_message
Returns: - phase: current scan phase (recon/testing/exploitation/reporting) - iteration: current/max iteration count - hypotheses: open/testing/confirmed/rejected counts + confirmed list - coverage: tested surfaces and untested attack vectors - cost_usd: cumulative LLM spend - recommended_next: highest-priority next action based on scan state

parameter.name: include_recommendations
parameter.description: Whether to include a suggested next action (default: true).

parameter.name: agent_id
parameter.description: Optional agent ID. Omit to auto-resolve from current runtime context.
